name: Free Play
description: Open sandbox with a steady mix of threat types. One of each system, no timer. Practice at your own pace — end the mission when you're done.
roe_briefing: Welcome to Free Play — an open sandbox exercise with no time limit.

SITUATION — A steady mix of air contacts will appear in your airspace. Expect anything from commercial quads to fixed-wing UAS, plus the occasional bird or balloon. Nothing scripted — just a representative mix of what you might see in a real-world C-UAS watch.
UNKNOWN contacts (yellow) — Do not engage. Call ATC for IFF clearance first.
HOSTILE / SUSPECT contacts — Cleared to engage with appropriate effector. Match the threat to the tool.
FRIENDLY contacts — Weapons safe. Any engagement is a ROE violation.
Birds and balloons — Ambient traffic. Do not engage.
You have one of each system available. Use this time to get comfortable with all of them.
End the mission manually whenever you're ready. You'll get a full debrief and score.
